description: Complete NichePulse database — 80+ niches across ALL major POD categories. Scored on 5 dimensions with real 2026 market data.
methodology: Each niche scored 1-5 on: Passion (identity attachment), Buy Frequency (repeat purchases), Gift Potential (others buy for them), Competition (1=saturated, 5=untapped), Trend (1=declining, 5=exploding). Total /25, grade S-D.

Pets & Animals.name: Dog Breed Specific
Pets & Animals.design_angle: Breed-specific sub-niche: 'Italian Greyhound Mom' not 'Dog Lover'. Vintage portrait style or funny breed stereotypes.
notes: Cross-sell: dog + hobby combo (Corgi yoga, GSD gamer)

Pets & Animals.name: Cat Breed Specific
Pets & Animals.design_angle: Maine Coon, Siamese, Scottish Fold sub-niches. 'Meowna Lisa' humor. Cat + coffee combo.

Pets & Animals.name: Pet Memorial
Pets & Animals.design_angle: Sensitive, beautiful tribute designs. Custom pet names/dates. Watercolor pet portraits.

Pets & Animals.name: Reptile / Amphibian Lovers
Pets & Animals.design_angle: Bearded dragons, ball pizzas, axolotls. 'Reptile Dad' humor. Scientific illustrations.

Pets & Animals.name: Bird / Avian Owners
Pets & Animals.design_angle: Parrot humor, 'Bird Dad/Aunt', specific species. 'I love my chicken' for backyard chicken owners.

Pets & Animals.name: Equestrian / Horse Lovers
Pets & Animals.design_angle: Dressage, barrel racing, trail riding sub-niches. 'Ride or Die' humor. Equestrian lifestyle.

Pets & Animals.name: Exotic Pet Lovers
Pets & Animals.design_angle: Snakes, tarantulas, hedgehogs, sugar gliders. 'My pet is cooler than yours' humor.

Gaming & Esports.name: Retro Gaming
Gaming & Esports.design_angle: 8-bit, NES/SNES/Sega nostalgia. 'Insert Coin' humor. Pixel art style. Avoid game logos (IP issue).
notes: Avoid copyright: focus on culture not logos

Gaming & Esports.name: Gaming Parents
Gaming & Esports.design_angle: 'Xbox Dad', 'PlayStation Mom', 'My favorite gamer' for kids. Parent + gamer crossover.
notes: Mom gamers buying for gamer kids

Gaming & Esports.name: Indie Games
Gaming & Esports.design_angle: Minecraft, Stardew Valley, Hollow Knight fans. Checkerboard/pixel aesthetics.

Gaming & Esports.name: Streamer / Creator Culture
Gaming & Esports.design_angle: Live stream notification alerts, 'going live', 'stream starting soon'. Gaming-adjacent.

Gaming & Esports.name: Esports Teams / Culture
Gaming & Esports.design_angle: Generic esports culture (not team logos). Gaming tournament vibes, victory royale humor.
notes: Use fan art style, avoid team logos

Professions & Careers.name: Nurses / Healthcare
Professions & Careers.design_angle: 'Chaos coordinator', dark humor, stethoscope heart. Avoid generic 'nurse life'. Go specific: 'ER nurse ICU humor'.

Professions & Careers.name: Teachers
Professions & Careers.design_angle: 'Teaching is my ministry', 'Est. 2015 classroom', subject-specific (math teacher humor). End-of-year gift spike.
notes: Huge gift market (parents buy teacher gifts)

Professions & Careers.name: Blue Collar Trades
Professions & Careers.design_angle: Welder, electrician, plumber, lineman, trucker. Grunge Americana style. Trade-specific humor. 'Licensed to weld'.
notes: Ranger Up model: patriotic + trade pride

Professions & Careers.name: Software Engineers / Tech
Professions & Careers.design_angle: Terminal jokes, 'syntax error', retro tech aesthetic. Language-specific (Python, Rust, Go). 'Works on my machine'.

Professions & Careers.name: First Responders
Professions & Careers.design_angle: Firefighter, police, EMT. Thin blue line/red line motifs. Specific: 'volunteer firefighter dad'.

Professions & Careers.name: Military / Veterans
Professions & Careers.design_angle: Branch-specific (Marines, Army, Navy, Air Force). Unit pride, veteran-owned. Patriotic but not cheesy. Ranger Up model.

Professions & Careers.name: Remote Workers
Professions & Careers.design_angle: 'Meetings that could be emails', WFH humor. Desk setup products. 'My office has a couch'.

Health & Fitness.name: Powerlifting / Strongman
Health & Fitness.design_angle: Heavy metal aesthetic, 'eat big lift big', barbell imagery. Gym brand alternatives. Aggressive typography.

Health & Fitness.name: Yoga / Mindfulness
Health & Fitness.design_angle: Sub-niches only: aerial yoga, hot yoga, yoga for runners, postpartum yoga. Watercolor zen aesthetic.

Health & Fitness.name: Pickleball
Health & Fitness.design_angle: 'Tears of my pickleball opponents', 'Dink don't think', court humor. Demographic skews older = buying power.

Health & Fitness.name: Mental Health Advocacy
Health & Fitness.design_angle: 'It's okay to not be okay', therapy normalization, self-care. Authentic tone = critical. Millennial/Gen Z audience.

Health & Fitness.name: ADHD / Neurodivergent
Health & Fitness.design_angle: 'Hyperfocus mode', 'Object permanence is lying to me', ADHD humor. Meme-native. AuDHD crossover.

Health & Fitness.name: Sober Living / Recovery
Health & Fitness.design_angle: 'One day at a time', sober anniversary, recovery pride. Varsity/badge style. Milestone celebrations.

Lifestyle & Identity.name: Introverts / Anti-Social
Lifestyle & Identity.design_angle: 'Social battery low', 'I came, I saw, I left', 'People? No thanks'. Minimalist ironic. Quiet humor.

Lifestyle & Identity.name: Vegan / Plant-Based
Lifestyle & Identity.design_angle: 'Kale 'Em All', vegan punk grunge. Not preachy = key. Plant-based humor. Resistance-styled illustrations.

Lifestyle & Identity.name: Chronic Illness / Spoonie
Lifestyle & Identity.design_angle: 'Spoon theory', invisible illness awareness. Tired but functional. Spoonie community language. Gift purchases from family.

Lifestyle & Identity.name: Autistic / Neurodivergent Pride
Lifestyle & Identity.design_angle: Autism pride, stimming awareness, 'different not less'. Sensory-friendly narratives. AuDHD overlap.

Lifestyle & Identity.name: LGBTQ+ Pride (Year-Round)
Lifestyle & Identity.design_angle: Specific identity palettes (trans, bi, ace, non-binary) in geometric/minimal style. Year-round, not just June.

Lifestyle & Identity.name: Faith / Christian
Lifestyle & Identity.design_angle: Scripture calligraphy, faith + profession crossover. Premium textures.

Hobbies & Micro-Passions.name: Board Games / Tabletop
Hobbies & Micro-Passions.design_angle: D&D, Catan, Ticket to Ride humor. 'I rolled a 1', 'Critical fail'. Game-specific inside jokes. Sub-niche by game.

Hobbies & Micro-Passions.name: Home Brewing / Craft Beer
Hobbies & Micro-Passions.design_angle: Brewing humor, 'Beer yeast: the best thing since sliced bread'. IPA obsession, hop puns.

Hobbies & Micro-Passions.name: Vinyl Collectors
Hobbies & Micro-Passions.design_angle: Vinyl revival aesthetic, retro record label style, album cover parody, 'Now Spinning' series.

Hobbies & Micro-Passions.name: Coffee Snobs
Hobbies & Micro-Passions.design_angle: Go micro: espresso nerds, cold brew addicts, pour-over snobs. 'Espresso yourself', bean origin humor.

Hobbies & Micro-Passions.name: Wine Lovers
Hobbies & Micro-Passions.design_angle: 'Mommy's sour juice', 'Wine o'clock', wine + humor. Vineyard aesthetic. Wine mom subculture.

Hobbies & Micro-Passions.name: Fishing
Hobbies & Micro-Passions.design_angle: 'Gone fishing', bass humor, species-specific (trout, muskie). Dad gift subculture.

Family & Milestones.name: New Parents / Baby
Family & Milestones.design_angle: 'Promoted to Daddy est. 2026', 'Tired as a mom'. Sleep-deprived humor. Matching parent-child sets.

Family & Milestones.name: Grandparents / Glamma
Family & Milestones.design_angle: 'Too cool to be called Grandma', 'Glamma' glam aesthetic, 'Grandkids are my favorite kids'. Bold, proud, fun.

Family & Milestones.name: Fur Baby Parents
Family & Milestones.design_angle: 'Dog Mom harder than Mom', 'Fur baby', 'My kid has four legs'. Dog/cat parent pride humor.

Humor & Meme Culture.name: Dark Humor
Humor & Meme Culture.design_angle: Gallows humor, 'I'm fine' (lying), sarcasm. Millennial/Gen Z humor. Reddit-native references.

Humor & Meme Culture.name: Dad Jokes / Mom Humor
Humor & Meme Culture.design_angle: 'Dad joke loading... 99%', 'Mom needs wine'. Family humor. Kid-safe but actually funny.

Humor & Meme Culture.name: Sarcastic / Snarky
Humor & Meme Culture.design_angle: 'I'm not arguing, I'm explaining why I'm right', snarky introvert humor. Not mean = confident.

Home & Decor.name: Modern Farmhouse
Home & Decor.design_angle: 'Gather', 'Farmhouse', rustic wood textures. Home decorator crossover. Premium product types.

Home & Decor.name: Witchy / Occult
Home & Decor.design_angle: Witch aesthetic, moon phases, tarot, crystals. 'Witch Please', dark academia crossover. Growing TikTok community.

Home & Decor.name: Dark Academia
Home & Decor.design_angle: Gothic serif, sepia, distressed ink, literary references. Bookish but dark. Vintage library aesthetic.

Home & Decor.name: Coastal / Beach House
Home & Decor.design_angle: 'Life is better at the beach', beach shack aesthetic. Nautical but not cheesy. Coastal grandmother trend.

Tech & Crypto.name: Crypto / Web3
Tech & Crypto.design_angle: 'HODL', 'to the moon', candlestick charts. Cyberpunk aesthetic. Avoid specific coin names (regulatory).
notes: Low when bear market, spikes when bull

Tech & Crypto.name: AI / ML Enthusiasts
Tech & Crypto.design_angle: 'I trained my own AI', 'ChatGPT writes my emails', neural network humor. Tech-savvy developer humor.

Seasonal & Holidays.name: Halloween
Seasonal & Holidays.design_angle: Spooky cute (not scary), Witch, vampire, skeleton humor. 'Spooky season', pumpkin spice crossover. Plan for August launch.

Seasonal & Holidays.name: Christmas / Holiday
Seasonal & Holidays.design_angle: Ugly sweater humor, 'Merry Christmas ya filthy animal', matching family sets. Gift-first. Plan for October launch.

Seasonal & Holidays.name: Mother's Day / Father's Day
Seasonal & Holidays.design_angle: Sentimental NOT generic. 'Best Mom' is dead. Go specific: 'Mom who works nights and still makes breakfast'.
